**Governing constraint:** $140 CPA (OP2) — shifting toward volume-first
**Handoff status:** Handoff to Harsha / AU team (week of 2026-04-13)
**OCI status:** Planned May 2026, MCC not yet created
**CCP availability:** N/A until Jul 2026 (CCP data unavailable)
**Next milestone:** AU team onboarding — Harsha owns execution

**Latest week (2026-W16):** 242 regs · $27,638 · CPA $114
**Next-week projection:** 207 regs (CI 188–288)
**Current-month OP2:** 1,071 regs · $147,592 cost · CPA $138
**Forecast accuracy (regs):** 71.4% hit rate, 19.7% avg error

**Structural baselines** (1):
- lp_switch (2026-03-26): Polaris LP migration — gated to open pages, CVR collapsed ~35% same-day [REVERTED 4/13 — prior deactivated for post-revert weeks]
